mano_cua.result_summary: 部署失败：Nuxt 2模块依赖fibers原生模块，在Node 18 + Apple Silicon上无法编译（node-gyp rebuild失败）。--ignore-scripts跳过编译后fibers二进制缺失导致Nuxt无法启动。且此bug为旧版Edge(非Chromium)特有SCRIPT1028错误，Chrome中无法复现。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Old Nuxt 2 module requires fibers native module which cannot compile on Node 18 + Apple Silicon. Bug is also Edge-specific (SCRIPT1028 error in non-Chromium Edge).
